main.name: Viona Kaleb
main.shortBio: Building digital products at large scale. Fullstack, frontend-heavy, UI/UX-minded, with a soft spot for cool systems and street cats.
main.longBio:
Deployed 3D wayfinding apps to serve thousands of visitors in high-traffic Singapore buildings. Architected a UK trading platform's Frontend with USD124M+ revenues and serving 1.2 million accounts globally.

Currently digitizing the largest state-owned bank in Indonesia, live in hundreds of branches, used by thousands of banking staff and customers, cutting fraud by 85%.

Outside work: Building tools to help people, writing articles, reading novels, trail running and patting street cats. Aiming to build AI research into production-grade services that move industries forward at scale.

industry.title: Published on Medium, ML and Software Dev

personal.title: Smart Branch live in 1,000+ branches, 30M users

testimonials.quote: I highly recommend Viona. Having worked closely with her in the Front-end squad for the Smart Branch Bank Mandiri project, I witnessed firsthand her strong technical skills and problem-solving abilities.
testimonials.author: Wahyu Fatur Rizki

testimonials.quote: I had the pleasure of working with Viona during her time at HypeStacks (now known as QuantTechnology). In my experience, Viona’s performance was exceptional; she consistently delivered tasks and projects on time, maintaining an impressive track record with minimal errors or bugs.
testimonials.author: Muh. Faldi Taufik

testimonials.quote: I had the privilege of working closely with Viona at  SuperApp (YC W18), where she consistently stood out as one of our strongest front-end (and frontend-focused fullstack) engineers.
testimonials.author: Halga Tamici

testimonials.quote: She has a great Front-End skill, able to turn UX design into a good web.  She's also a fun person. Overall, she could be a nice asset for your company.
testimonials.author: Alvian Supriadi

education.description: Machine Learning focus. Thesis on Temporal Convolutional Networks for karate movement classification, combining MoveNet Lightning pose estimation with a dual-head TCN.
Awarded a Bachelor's scholarship for being one of the top graduates, funded by the government. Thesis on breast cancer prediction using KNN, reaching ~96.49% accuracy at K=17.

work.title: Software Engineer
descriptions: Built features for Smart Branch by Mandiri, a digital banking platform live across 1,000+ branches with 30 million users nationwide, contributing to an 85% reduction in fraud incidents.
Shipped wholesale banking features for KOPRA by Mandiri, the platform behind IDR 10,000+ trillion (USD 600B+) in annual transaction volume.
Delivered banking workflows that fulfilled strict security, compliance and audit standards in collaboration with product, backend and QA teams.

work.title: Frontend Engineer
descriptions: Architected and built the frontend stack from scratch for YourPropFirm, a B2B real-time trading analytics platform with USD 124M+ revenues, serving 1.2M+ trading accounts and 65+ prop firm clients globally.
Worked cross-functionally with a distributed international team to turn complex trading concepts into performant real-time data visualization UI.

work.title: Frontend Engineer
descriptions: Owned full frontend delivery across multiple product lines for a social commerce and hyper-local supply chain platform serving Indonesia's retail ecosystem.
Pushed test coverage to 90% using Jest and React Testing Library, cutting regression bugs in production.
Shipped merchant onboarding, ordering and logistics features in partnership with product and design.

work.title: Front-End Developer
descriptions: Deployed 3D wayfinding systems to major Singapore landmarks including the Supreme Court, Republic Plaza, and Woods Square, serving thousands of visitors in high-traffic government and commercial buildings.
Integrated 3D rendering with real-time location data alongside a multinational engineering team.

work.title: Frontend Engineer
descriptions: Built Indonesia's first integrated e-sports community and tournament platform, connecting players with tournament organizers and sponsors. Supported partnerships with Tokopedia, JD.ID, and Firstmedia.
Shaped the early gaming scene in Indonesia by giving players a clear path from casual to competitive play.
